mapper.sql: ci.id, ci.user_id, ci.product_id, ci.quantity, ci.price, ci.selected_specs, ci.created_at, ci.updated_at, p.name AS product_name, p.image_url, p.stock, p.status AS product_status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM cart_items ci JOIN products p ON ci.product_id = p.id WHERE ci.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT FROM cart_items ci JOIN products p ON ci.product_id = p.id WHERE ci.id = #{id}

SELECT FROM cart_items ci JOIN products p ON ci.product_id = p.id WHERE ci.id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_items (user_id, product_id, quantity, price, selected_specs, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{selectedSpecs}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM cart_items WHERE id IN
#{id}
